dashboard.paymentPendingDesc: If money was charged, do not pay again. We will update the status automatically.
dashboard.priceHint: The exact price is calculated after document upload and analysis.
dashboard.priceHintElectronic: Electronic translation — from ₸1,500. Final price after upload.
dashboard.priceHintOfficial: Translation with provider stamp — from 5 000 ₸. Final price after upload.
dashboard.priceHintNotarized: Notarized translation — from 13 000 ₸. Final price after upload. Delivery in Almaty — from ₸21,000.

dashboard.subBannerDesc: From ₸1,500 per document — no subscription required
dashboard.usingPlanSub: Using your {plan} plan · {remaining} doc{s} remaining — no payment required

electronic.label: Electronic translation
electronic.desc: Electronic document translation in PDF or DOCX without a signature, stamp or notarization. Ready in 2–5 minutes.

certified.label: Translation with provider stamp
certified.desc: Translation is reviewed by a qualified human translator, signed by the translator, and stamped with the provider seal. No notarization.

notarization.label: Translation with notarization
notarization.desc: Translation is reviewed by a translator and stamped with the provider seal, then forwarded to a partner notary to notarize the translator's signature.

notary.citiesNotConfigured: Notarization service is not yet available in your area. Contact us for availability.
notary.phoneRequired: Phone number is required for delivery
notary.addressRequired: Delivery address is required for delivery

urgency.sameDayHint: Documents must be uploaded and paid before 12:00 Almaty time. After 12:00 a +50% surcharge applies; after 18:00 a ×2 night surcharge applies.
urgency.notaryCutoffPassed: This quote expired because the notary cutoff time has passed. Please recalculate.
urgency.standardHint: Standard notarization is completed on the next business day for documents uploaded and paid after 12:00 Almaty time. If uploaded before 12:00, same-day completion may be possible subject to translator/notary availability.

customerComment.label: ORDER COMMENT
customerComment.placeholder: E.g.: specify formatting requirements, target authority, desired deadline, or other preferences.

dashboard.closeTabOk: You can close this tab — your order is being processed

errors.pleaseSelectFile: Please select at least one file
errors.totalSizeExceeded: Total file size is too large. The limit is 50 MB.
errors.fileTooLarge: The file "{file}" exceeds the 25 MB limit.
errors.fileCountExceeded: Too many files. The maximum is {max}.
errors.invalidFileSignature: The file "{file}" does not match its file type.

promoCode.label: PROMO CODE / PARTNER CODE
promoCode.helperText: If you were referred by a WPO partner, visa center, consultant or translator, enter their code and get 10% off your order.
promoCode.attributionHint: This order will be linked to a WPO partner.

dashboard.uploadedQuoteReadyWithDiscount: Document uploaded — price: {price} ₸ (saved {saved} ₸ with partner code). Confirm payment below.

formats.title: Electronic translation formats
formats.body: Electronic translation is provided in editable DOCX and HTML formats. For documents with complex tables, scans, or non-standard layout, manual adjustment of column widths, line breaks, or formatting may be required.

finalFormat.official: Final format: PDF after translator review
finalFormat.notarized: Final format: notary package / PDF after partner process

startWizard.pageSubtitle: Upload your document, choose your options, and see the price before you sign up.
startWizard.consentText: By uploading a document, you agree to the Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and processing of your document for the purpose of calculating a translation price.
startWizard.requiresOperatorReviewNotice: This order needs a quick manual check before payment. Our team will confirm the final price shortly.
startWizard.signInHint: You'll be asked to sign in or create a free account before payment — your document and selections will be kept.
startWizard.draftNotFound: We couldn't find this order. Please start again.
startWizard.consentMissing: We couldn't confirm your acceptance of the Terms of Service. Please start again.
startWizard.checkoutError: Something went wrong preparing your payment. Please try again.

errors.missingFields: Please select source language, target language, and service level.
errors.languagePairMustDiffer: Source and target languages must be different.
errors.invalidFileSignature: The file "{file}" does not match its file type.
errors.fileTooLarge: The file "{file}" exceeds the 20 MB limit.
errors.fileCountExceeded: Too many files. The maximum is {max}.
errors.totalSizeExceeded: Total file size is too large. The limit for uploads before sign-up is 20 MB.
errors.rateLimitedHourly: Too many price calculations. Please try again in an hour.
errors.rateLimitedDaily: You've reached today's limit for price calculations. Please try again tomorrow.
errors.uploadFailed: File upload failed. Please try again.
errors.calculationFailed: Could not calculate a price. Please try again.
errors.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.sessionMissing: Your session could not be verified. Please reload the page and try again.
